title: Declared vs Implementation Drift
findings: 确认 4 条新的 declared-vs-implementation drift：experimental HTTP 包继续引用 server 已移除 exports；doctor 公开文案硬编码 48 checks 但实现只有约 46/47；tooling manifest 的 protected-token 输入路径指向不存在的 root templates；server npm metadata 仍描述旧 .fabric/agents.meta 知识库。
issues_found: [{"title":"Experimental HTTP APIs import server barrel exports that the server explicitly removed","severity":"medium","description":"packages/server/src/index.ts says getKnowledge/readAgentsMeta are no longer re-exported after agents.meta decolo, but the quarantined HTTP API sources still import readAgentsMeta/getKnowledge from @fenglimg/fabric-server. If this package is restored or typechecked with current server d.ts, those endpoints target a public API that no longer exists.","location":"packages/server-http-experimental/src/api/knowledge.ts:1","fix_direction":"Either remove/retire the legacy /api/rules and /api/rules/context endpoints, or update them to current store-aware APIs exported by @fenglimg/fabric-server; add a direct typecheck path for the quarantined package before restoration.","affected_components":["packages/server-http-experimental/src/api/knowledge.ts","packages/server-http-experimental/src/api/ledger.ts","packages/server-http-experimental/src/api/knowledge-context.ts","packages/server/src/index.ts"],"tags":["declared-vs-implementation","server-http-quarantine","export-drift"]},{"title":"Doctor CLI/README still advertise 48 checks after the implementation changed","severity":"medium","description":"README and doctor CLI help/TLDR hard-code '48 checks', but runDoctorReport currently builds 46 unconditional checks plus one optional promote-ledger check, so a clean report can claim all 48 checks are green even though the implementation no longer has 48 checks in that array.","location":"packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts:773","fix_direction":"Stop hard-coding the check count in CLI/docs; derive it from report.checks.length or rewrite copy to avoid an exact number. Update README occurrences and any snapshot expectations together.","affected_components":["packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts","README.md","packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts"],"tags":["declared-vs-implementation","cli-copy","doctor"]},{"title":"Tooling manifest protected-token inputs point at obsolete template roots","severity":"medium","description":"docs/tooling-manifest.json declares lint-protected-tokens inputs as templates/bootstrap/** and templates/claude-skills/**, but the actual script reads packages/cli/templates/bootstrap and packages/cli/templates/skills, and there is no root templates directory. A machine-readable source_of_truth manifest will mislead automation about what the quality gate validates.","location":"docs/tooling-manifest.json:72","fix_direction":"Update the manifest paths/names to packages/cli/templates/bootstrap and packages/cli/templates/skills, or explicitly mark bootstrap as absent and covered by packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts tests.","affected_components":["docs/tooling-manifest.json","scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts","packages/cli/templates"],"tags":["declared-vs-implementation","tooling-manifest","quality-gate"]},{"title":"Published server package metadata still describes retired .fabric/agents.meta storage","severity":"low","description":"@fenglimg/fabric-server package.json describes the server as managing a .fabric knowledge base plus agents.meta.json, while current project policy says knowledge entries live only in mounted stores and server index comments say the co-location agents.meta surface is no longer re-exported. This stale npm metadata presents the old storage model to package consumers.","location":"packages/server/package.json:4","fix_direction":"Refresh the package description to mention mounted stores, stdio MCP, event ledger/metrics, and store-aware knowledge retrieval; avoid advertising .fabric/knowledge or agents.meta.json as managed storage.","affected_components":["packages/server/package.json","npm metadata","store-only documentation"],"tags":["declared-vs-implementation","package-metadata","store-only-drift"]}]
